ddls:
CREATE TABLE "growth_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each growth metric entry */,
  "child_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the child */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the child in months */,
  "height_in" TEXT /* Height measurement in inches */,
  "waist_in" TEXT /* Waist circumference in inches */,
  "hips_in" TEXT /* Hip measurement in inches */,
  "hips_in_2" TEXT /* Second hip measurement in inches */,
  "weight_lbs" TEXT /* Weight measurement in pounds */,
  "head_circumference_in" TEXT /* Head circumference in inches */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurements were taken */,
  "pediatrician_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pediatrician who took the measurements */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_growth_metrics_pediatrician_id FOREIGN KEY ("pediatrician_id") REFERENCES pediatricians ("pediatrician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pediatricians" (
  "pediatrician_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pediatrician */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the pediatrician */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the pediatrician */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the pediatrician */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the pediatrician */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization area of the pediatrician */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Professional license number */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the pediatrician's office */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pediatrician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health record */,
  "child_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the child */,
  "vaccination_status" TEXT /* Vaccination status of the child */,
  "nutrition_info" TEXT /* Nutritional information for the child */,
  "physical_activity" TEXT /* Physical activity description for the child */,
  "blood_type" TEXT /* Blood type of the child */,
  "family_medical_history" TEXT /* Family medical history */,
  "allergy_history" TEXT /* History of allergies */,
  "dental_history" TEXT /* Dental health history */,
  "immunization_records" TEXT /* Detailed immunization records */,
  "growth_notes" TEXT /* Notes on growth and development observations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "growth_charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each growth chart entry */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range for the chart */,
  "height_range" TEXT /* Height range for the chart */,
  "waist_range" TEXT /* Waist circumference range for the chart */,
  "hips_range" TEXT /* Hip measurement range for the chart */,
  "chart_type" TEXT /* Type of growth chart */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender-specific charts */,
  "weight_range" TEXT /* Weight range for the chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_management" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging into the system */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., pediatrician, researcher, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "child_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the child */,
  "pediatrician_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pediatrician */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the appointment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes taken during the appointment */,
  "appointment_type" TEXT /* Type of appointment */,
  "appointment_status" TEXT /* Status of the appointment */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the appointment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the appointment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the appointment was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_pediatrician_id FOREIGN KEY ("pediatrician_id") REFERENCES pediatricians ("pediatrician_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES user_management ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity performed by the user (e.g., login, update) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity was performed */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_management ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Status indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_management ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research study */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the research study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the study */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the study */,
  "results" TEXT /* Summary of the study results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)
